title: Live Updates: Iran Ramps Up Threats as It Retaliates Against U.S. Strikes
summary_full: Senior Iranian officials called for revenge against the United States and Israel for killing the late supreme leader, Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, as a new exchange of attacks pushed the region into deeper uncertainty.
summary_public: Senior Iranian officials called for revenge against the United States and Israel for killing the late supreme leader, Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, as a new exchange of attacks pushed the region into deeper uncertainty.

IL.evidence: revenge against the United States and Israel
